topic: How one Oman retail company cut payroll prep from three days to two hours after switching to WPS-integrated payroll
format: Open with a SmartPro Hub product capability, then show the real-world business outcome it enables
post:
Three days of payroll prep. Every single month.

That was the reality for a retail company in Oman before they moved to SmartPro Hub. One HR manager, dozens of employees, a spreadsheet maze, and a bank portal that didn't talk to anything else.

After switching to WPS-integrated payroll on SmartPro Hub, that same process now takes two hours.

Not because they hired more people. They didn't. SmartPro Hub connects employee records, salary calculations, and direct WPS bank submission in one place — no re-entering data, no chasing confirmations, no reconciling three different files the morning payroll is due.

We built it this way because fragmented systems don't just waste time. They create errors that show up on payday, when it's already too late to fix them without someone having a very bad morning.

Our customers in Oman run payroll for anywhere between 10 and 400+ employees through the same platform that handles their SPF filings, Omanization compliance, and work permit tracking. Everything in one place, one source of truth.

If your team is still burning days on payroll prep every month, that's not a staffing problem. That's a process problem, and it's fixable.

Book a 20-minute demo: https://www.thesmartpro.io/demo?utm_source=linkedin&utm_medium=social&utm_campaign=product-proof
